author: Miguel do Rosário
title: The Resurrection of American McCarthyism: A New Red Scare
description: Washington's crusade against Chinese technology repeats the darkest chapter of American political paranoia — now with semiconductors instead of telegrams.

author: Miguel do Rosário
title: China's Open Kimi K3 Shatters US AI Dominance
description: An open-weight 2.8T model just broke the Western monopoly on frontier AI — and with it, the geopolitics of technological containment.

author: Paulo Nogueira Batista Jr.
title: China Does Not Improvise
description: Strategic reserves, long-term planning and resilience: how Beijing absorbs Washington's economic containment without missing a beat.

author: Paulo Nogueira Batista Jr.
title: The Greatest Country in the World
description: Iran's defense of sovereign nations in West Asia and the strategic costs of a declining empire.

author: Paulo Nogueira Batista Jr.
title: BRICS and the Path to De-Dollarization
description: From a common reference currency to payment systems outside SWIFT: the realistic roadmap for BRICS monetary independence.
